findings.description: Decision 스키마 필드 수 불일치: PART2 says 18필드(D2.1-D2 §4.1), MASTER_SPEC says 16필드. PART2 notes H-7: 16→18 수정, meaning this was an intentional correction based on D2.1-D2 schema spec. D2.1-D2 is higher authority for schema details.
findings.evidence: PART2 L434: 'DecisionSchema | 18 (FREEZE)' vs MASTER_SPEC §4.4: 'Decision 스키마 (16필드, FREEZE)'

findings.description: MCP max_retries: PART2 config sets 3 (PHASE_B4), but MASTER_SPEC §5.5 says max 2 retries (from D2.0-03). Config value and design spec differ.
findings.evidence: PART2 L183: 'max_retries = 3' vs MASTER_SPEC §5.5: '재시도: 일시적 실패 최대 2회'

findings.description: VamosError 구조 (Result<T, VamosError>) 및 ErrorHandlingStandard가 PART2 구현 가이드에 명시적으로 포함되지 않음. D2.0-02 §0.3에서 정의된 핵심 에러 처리 패턴.
findings.evidence: D2.0-02 §0.3 defines VamosError with failure_code, message, fallback_id, trace_id — PART2 has no explicit mention

findings.description: 성능 벤치마크 목표가 PART2에 누락됨. MASTER_SPEC §4.8에서 정의된 단순응답 ≤2s, 복합응답 ≤10s, Self-check ≤1s 등이 구현 가이드에 반영 필요.
findings.evidence: MASTER_SPEC §4.8 defines 5 performance benchmarks not mentioned in PART2

findings.description: S7E-011 Instruction Hierarchy (5-level prompt priority L0~L4) is CRITICAL V1 item in D2.0-07 but not reflected in PART2. This is essential for prompt injection defense.
findings.evidence: D2.0-07 S7E-011: L0(Core Constitution) > L1(System Prompt) > L2(User) > L3(Tool/Doc) > L4(History) — not in PART2

findings.description: Guardrails L2 역할 표현 차이: PART2 '출력 검증' vs D2.0-07 '처리 단계 검증'. L2는 처리 중(during processing) 검증이 핵심이나, PART2는 출력 검증으로 축약.
findings.evidence: PART2 L2582: 'Guardrails AI (L2) | 출력 검증' vs D2.0-07 §1.1: '2층 — 처리 방어: Guardrails AI'

findings.description: 멀티에이전트 비용 15배 경고 규칙 누락. D2.0-07 §4.3.2에서 싱글 대비 3배 초과 시 자동 경고 발생 규칙이 PART2에 반영되지 않음.
findings.evidence: D2.0-07 §4.3.2: 'I-9 Cost Gate에서 멀티 에이전트 태스크의 비용을 싱글 대비 모니터링하고, 3배 초과 시 자동 경고'

findings.description: 커뮤니티 스킬 보안 검증 4단계 프로세스가 PART2에 누락됨.
findings.evidence: D2.0-07: 소스확인→코드스캔→샌드박스실행→권한선언 4단계 — not in PART2

findings.description: SDAR State Machine 상태명 차이: PART2는 간소화된 이름(IDLE, DETECTING 등)을 사용하고, SDAR_SPEC은 정식 이름(SDAR_S0_MONITORING 등)을 사용. PART2가 XREF 주석으로 인지하고 있는 차이.
findings.evidence: PART2 L2832: 'IDLE → DETECTING → ...' vs SDAR_SPEC §7.1: 'SDAR_S0_MONITORING → SDAR_S1_DETECTED → ...'

findings.description: SDAR Layer 1 Channel B/C 세부 감지 규칙(빈도 임계값, 이상탐지 baseline)이 PART2에 누락됨.
findings.evidence: SDAR_SPEC §2.2: Channel B 빈도(5분내 3회), 연쇄(60초), Channel C 응답시간 200%, QoD<0.5 3회 등

findings.description: SDAR AR-Level ↔ Autonomy Level 매핑 및 RBAC-AR 권한 매트릭스가 PART2에 누락됨.
findings.evidence: SDAR_SPEC §3.2: L0→AR-L0, L1→AR-L2(기본값), L2→AR-L3, L3→AR-L4. §3.4: OWNER=AR-L4까지, ADMIN=AR-L3까지

findings.description: SDAR Failure Code 13개 및 Fallback 4개가 PART2 §6.9에 열거되지 않음. 구현 시 SDAR_SPEC 직접 참조 필요.
findings.evidence: SDAR_SPEC §6.4: 13 failure codes (SDAR_DETECTION_TIMEOUT~SDAR_KILL_SWITCH_ACTIVE) + 4 fallbacks

findings.description: SDAR sdar/ 디렉토리 구조(detection/, diagnosis/, prescription/, repair/, verification/)가 PART2에 누락됨.
findings.evidence: SDAR_SPEC §6.5 defines full sdar/ subdirectory with 6 subpackages and specific file names

findings.description: PART2 §6.7 V2 section does not explicitly state V2 Lead Agent model upgrades to Opus. SOT AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC §9.2 and §11.2.1 clearly specify V2 Lead=Opus.
findings.evidence: PART2 V2 table only lists Sub-agent models. SOT §9.2: 'Lead=Opus, Sub=Sonnet/Haiku 차등'. SOT §11.2.1: 'V2 Lead=Opus'.

findings.description: Per-task budget information not included in PART2. SOT §11.2.1 specifies V1=500/task, V2=2000/task, V3=5000/task.
findings.evidence: SOT §11.2.1 cost table includes 'per-task budget' column. PART2 only mentions daily/monthly limits.

findings.description: Agent lifecycle states (created->initialized->active->suspended->terminated->archived) from SOT §2.4.1 not described in PART2 §6.7.
findings.evidence: SOT §2.4 provides detailed lifecycle with LogEvent mappings. PART2 omits this.

findings.description: SOT agent events (AgentEvent enum, 17+ events) poorly covered in PART2. Only 3 agent events listed in §6.11 vs 17+ in SOT §2.3.2.
findings.evidence: PART2 §6.11: 'agent.task.started/completed/failed'. SOT §2.3.2: team.created/started/completed/aborted, delegation.sent/accepted/rejected/timeout, agent.spawned/active/suspended/terminated, handoff.initiated/completed, etc.

findings.description: Agent isolation policies (context, file, tool, network, code sandbox isolation) from SOT §11.1.3 not documented in PART2 §6.7.
findings.evidence: SOT §11.1.3 AgentIsolationPolicy class with 5 isolation dimensions. PART2 has general security in §6.5 but no agent-specific isolation.

findings.description: PART2 LogEventSchema field names (trace_id, timestamp, level, module, event_type, message, data) do not match SOT D2.1-D2 §4.2 field names (event_type, producer, when, payload, severity, sinks, links). Count is same (7) but field naming is different.
findings.evidence: PART2 L435 comment: '7필드(trace_id,timestamp,level,module,event_type,message,data)'. D2.1-D2 §4.2: event_type, producer, when, payload, severity + sinks, links.

findings.description: PART2 claims MemoryRecord has 20 fields. D2.1-D6 §4.1 MemoryRecordSchema has 19 fields (7 required + 5 optional common + 7 L3/B-2 extension). Off by 1.
findings.evidence: D6 §4.1 field count: record_id, project_id, scope, memory_type, content_summary, created_at, policy_decision (7R) + ttl, tags, source_refs, masked, activation_state, version (6O) + procedure_id, target_scope, trigger_conditions, steps, required_tools, safety_notes, provenance (7 L3 ext) = 20 total. Actually 20 if 'version' counted separately. Re-verified: 7+6+7=20. Match after recount.

findings.description: PART2 V0 schema table (25 schemas) does not include D5 Phase-A additions: CircuitBreakerSchema, GatePipelineMappingSchema, HITLRequestSchema, ResponseEnvelopeSchema (as D5 owned).
findings.evidence: D2.1-D5 §0 lists 9 schemas total (including Phase A additions). PART2 only lists WorkflowStage(4), WorkflowOutput(3), FailureReport(4) from D5, plus ResponseEnvelope referencing CLAUDE.md not D5.

findings.description: PART2 V0 schema table does not include D3 CloudLibrary schemas (7 schemas) or D4 additional schemas (PromptCacheManager, RateLimitConfig, BackupConfig). These may be V2+ but exist in SOT.
findings.evidence: D3 §5.6-5.12: 7 CloudLibrary schemas. D4 §4.4-4.6: 3 additional schemas. All absent from PART2 25-schema table.

findings.description: PART2 references ResponseEnvelope SOT as CLAUDE.md §12, but D2.1-D5 §4.9 defines ResponseEnvelopeSchema as D5-owned SOT. The authoritative source attribution is incorrect.
findings.evidence: PART2 L436: 'ResponseEnvelope | 5 (LOCK) | CLAUDE.md §12'. D2.1-D5 §4.9: ResponseEnvelopeSchema with owner_doc=D5.

findings.description: RAG operation limits (15 documents / 30 chunks) from SOT D2.0-06 §1.1 not mentioned in PART2 Phase 2 section.
findings.evidence: SOT §1.1: '운영 한계: 문서 15개 / 청크 30개'. PART2 V1-Phase 2 lists RAG pipeline stages but omits these operational limits.

findings.description: Memory search result limits (per-layer 5, total 20 -> reranker -> top 5) from SOT S7D-042 not specified in PART2.
findings.evidence: SOT S7D-042: '레이어당 5개, 총 20개 후보 → reranker → top 5'. PART2 omits this.

findings.description: Memory export format: SOT S7D-008 says JSON/SQLite, PART2 says JSON/Markdown. Minor format discrepancy.
findings.evidence: SOT S7D-008: 'JSON/SQLite 형식으로 전체 메모리 내보내기'. PART2 L1347: 'JSON/Markdown export'.

findings.description: L0 session buffer management parameters (80% context, 70% auto-summarize) from SOT S7D-035 not detailed in PART2.
findings.evidence: SOT S7D-035: 'LLM context 80%, 70% 초과 시 자동 요약'. PART2 only mentions 'SQLite, TTL=session_end' for L0.

findings.description: Memory promotion scoring formula (access_count*0.4 + recency*0.3 + confidence*0.3) from SOT S7D-040 not documented in PART2.
findings.evidence: SOT S7D-040 defines promotion_score formula. PART2 does not include implementation details for memory promotion scoring.

findings.description: VectorStore adapter interface contract (upsert, search with top_k defaults, delete, get_by_id) from SOT D2.0-06 §2.2-A not documented in PART2 Phase 2.
findings.evidence: SOT §2.2-A defines minimum adapter contract with 4 methods and specific defaults. PART2 mentions Chroma but not the adapter interface.

findings.description: DCL QoD threshold (0.5) in PART2 differs from general memory QoD floor (0.4) in SOT. The relationship between these thresholds is not clarified.
findings.evidence: PART2 L3134: 'DCL QoD >= 0.5 → RAG 삽입'. SOT §2.5.2: 'QoD < 0.4: L2/L3 저장 금지'. Different contexts but threshold relationship unclear.

findings.description: LOCK-AT 근거 참조에서 SOT의 '고정N' 접미사가 PART2에서 누락
findings.evidence: SOT LOCK-AT-003='D2.0-05 §7.3 고정3', PART2='D2.0-05 §7.3'. 추적성 약간 저하.

findings.description: Agent Lifecycle 5-state LOCK (IDLE→ASSIGNED→EXECUTING→REPORTING→TERMINATED)가 PART2 §6.7에 없음
findings.evidence: AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC §2.4.1 정의된 필수 생명주기 상태가 PART2 구현 가이드에 미포함.

findings.description: Agent 메시지 포맷 상세 필드(msg_id, from_agent, to_agent 등)가 PART2에 미기재
findings.evidence: AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC §2.3.1의 LOCK 메시지 스키마 8개 필드가 PART2에서 HMAC만 언급.

findings.description: PART2 CI/CD를 14개 개별 workflow로 분리 표기하나 PHASE_B6/B2 정본은 ci.yml 단일 통합 워크플로우
findings.evidence: PART2 L2556 NOTE (XREF-V0-19)에서 인지 중이며 구현 시 B6 통합 구조를 따르라고 안내. 실질 위험 낮음.

findings.description: Branch strategy (main/develop/feature/hotfix/release)가 PART2에 미포함
findings.evidence: PHASE_B6 §1.3 정본에 5개 브랜치 전략 명시. PART2 구현 가이드에서 누락.

findings.description: Docker 서비스명 3개 (vamos-orange-core, vamos-blue-nodes, vamos-api-gateway)가 PART2에 미기재
findings.evidence: PHASE_B6 §4.3 matrix에 3개 서비스 정의. V2 구현 시 참조 필요.

findings.description: HITL 타임아웃 불일치: PART2는 '10분 auto-deny' (CLAUDE.md §7.3), MASTER_SPEC §7.9는 '기본 30분, P2 무제한'
findings.evidence: PART2 L3368 '승인 타임아웃 10분 auto-deny' vs MASTER_SPEC §7.9 L856 '기본 30분, P2는 무제한'. 이 두 값은 서로 다른 컨텍스트(일반 승인 vs HITL 개입)일 수 있으나 명시적 구분이 없어 구현 시 혼동 가능.

findings.description: V0 스키마 수: PART2=25개 vs CLAUDE.md=24개
findings.evidence: PART2 L3261 '25개 스키마' vs CLAUDE.md §10 '24개 스키마'. v15.0.0에서 AutonomyLevelSchema 추가로 25개가 됐으나 CLAUDE.md는 미갱신 상태.

findings.description: V0 모듈 스켈레톤: PART2='I-1~I-3,I-5,I-19 (5개)' vs CLAUDE.md='I-1~I-5+I-19 (6개, I-4 포함)'
findings.evidence: PART2 L3262 explicitly excludes I-4 citing READINESS §2.7. CLAUDE.md §10 includes I-4. 구현 시 I-4 포함 여부 혼동 가능.

findings.description: 워크플로우 패턴 카탈로그 12건이 PART2 §7 크로스컷 검토에 미포함
findings.evidence: MASTER_SPEC §7.14 defines 12 workflow patterns. Not referenced in PART2 review section.

findings.description: 83개 데이터 소스 상세 분류(P0/P1/S0/KB)가 PART2 §6.8에 미포함
findings.evidence: AI_INVESTING_SPEC §3 defines detailed tier classification. PART2 only mentions 'yfinance' in architecture diagram.

findings.description: 96개 전략 카탈로그(기술적 40+퀀트 56)가 PART2에 미포함
findings.evidence: AI_INVESTING_SPEC §7-8 lists 96 strategies. PART2 §6.8 only references generic '5-Agent Pipeline'.

findings.description: 법적 제약 시스템(Wash Sale Rule, PDT Rule, Uptick Rule)이 PART2 §6.8에 미포함
findings.evidence: AI_INVESTING_SPEC §10.1 defines 3 legal rules with automatic order blocking. Critical for P2 domain compliance.

findings.description: Python 버전 불일치: AI_INVESTING_SPEC D-S5-01='Python 3.12 확정' vs VAMOS 전체='Python 3.11+'
findings.evidence: AI_INVESTING_SPEC §14.2 L455 states 'D-S5-01: Python 3.11 vs 3.12 → 3.12 확정'. PART2/CLAUDE.md specify Python 3.11+. AI Investing 모듈에서 3.12 전용 기능 사용 시 충돌 가능.

findings.description: PART2 기술스택 14항목 테이블이 SOT §14 원본과 카테고리/순서가 다르게 재구성됨
findings.evidence: PART2 L2726 NOTE (XREF-S6-06)에서 자체 인지. SOT §14는 인프라/도구 중심 14개, PART2는 기능 카테고리별 재구성. yfinance/Alpha Vantage 등은 SOT §14에 없는 항목.

adversarial_new_findings.description: policy_gate enum inconsistency: CLAUDE.md/PART2 Gate table uses 4 values (block|require_approval|mask|allow) while MASTER_SPEC Decision schema uses 3 values (deny|restrict|allow). Different enum vocabularies for the same concept.

note: Pass 1 발견만 기록. 수정은 Pass 2 통합 수정 시 처리 (ABD-3 원칙).
